---
title: "Exploratory Analysis"
---

## Overview

Exploratory Data Analysis of the 2024 Lightcast job postings dataset.
All charts are pre-rendered and saved to `assets/figures/` — no raw data is loaded at render time.

---

## Salary Distribution

![Salary Distribution](../assets/figures/eda_salary_dist.png)

---

## Top Industries by Job Postings

![Top Industries](../assets/figures/eda_top_industries.png)

---

## Employment Type Breakdown

![Employment Type](../assets/figures/eda_employment_type.png)

---

## Job Postings by State

![Jobs by State](../assets/figures/eda_jobs_by_state.png)

---

## Remote vs On-Site Trends

![Remote vs On-Site](../assets/figures/eda_remote_type.png)

---

## Education Level Requirements

![Education Requirements](../assets/figures/eda_education.png)

---

> Charts generated from `data/processed/lightcast_job_postings_relational.csv` and joined dimension tables.
> Source code in `eda_generate.py` (run locally before push).
